steps.title: Identify what the study found
steps.content: The passage directly states two key findings: white butterflies appeared more often on green flowers (color linked to behavior), and butterflies fed more often on cloudy days (weather linked to behavior).

steps.title: Apply the findings to the choices
steps.content: D is the only choice that includes both factors explicitly found in the research. A, B, and C each exclude at least one of these factors. This matches choice D — D is correct.
